holdings.n: Deposits With Broker For Short Positions

overview.description: The Innovator U.S. Small Cap Managed 10 Buffer ETF (KBFR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund provides US small-cap equity exposure with a rolling 10% downside buffer over one-year periods. The fund uses a laddered options strategy to help reduce downside risk while sacrificing part of potential upside gains. KBFR was launched on Feb 23, 2026 and is issued by Innovator.
